description: 5 identical medium-complexity prompts — tracks correctness, token usage, and cost efficiency per model

questions.question:
Reply with ONLY the number.
A team has 18 queued tickets. They close 7, reopen 2 of those, then 5 new tickets arrive, then they close 2 more. How many tickets remain?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Measures token efficiency by running identical prompts — compares correctness rate and output token count across models

known_scoring_limitations: Deterministic text scoring may not capture all semantically valid responses.
